titleStmt.title: SII 11.140: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 140. (B.K. No. 74 of 1927-28.) DŌṆI, MUṆḌARGI PĒṬHĀ, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE CHĀVAḌI.

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the time of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and records the gift of a garden made by Sōvi-seṭṭi to Chārukīrtti-Paṇḍita, the disciple of Munichandra Traividya-Bhaṭṭāraka, of the Yāpunīya-saṅgha and Vṛikshamūla-gaṇa, for the benefit of the basadi, built by him, evidently at Drōṇāpura. The gift was made in the presence of the Sixty Mahājanas of the great agrahāra Drōṇāpura headed by the Ūroḍeya and the several Seṭṭis of the place.

The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 20, [Yuva], Phālguṇa, śu. 13, Thursday. In Yuva, Phālguṇa, śu. 13 fell on Friday commencing at ·13 and corresponded to Friday, February 8, A.D. 1096. In the next year Dhātu, however, the details correspond to A.D. 1097, February 26, Thursday; the tithi commenced at ·11.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁcchanaṁ jīyāttraiḷōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōtta rābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamā
caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi piriyarasi lakṣmīmahādēvi . kanda . ghanajaghana diṁdubiṁ
bānanada sarōjātanayana datinibiḍaghaṭastanada parapuṣṭaninadada vanitājanatiḷaka malte lakṣmīdēvi . Ā
lakṣmīmahādēviyar . v® . baḷasirddadrīṁdradiṁ suttiṟidodavida nānāvanabrātadiṁ kōkiḷakēkīkīranādaṁga
Linesava teṭākaṁgaḷiṁ dēvabhōgaṁgaḷi natyuttuṁgakōṭāntarataṭavikaṭāṭṭāḷakānīkadiṁ kaṇgoḷisirkkuṁ bhūmibhā
māmaḷamukhatiḷakaṁ drōṇikāgrāmamettaṁ . Enisida drōṇīpuramaṁ sukhadināḷu ttamire . v® . Akhi
ḷōrvvīstutya ratyūrjjitaviḷasitadhamma rśśaśāṁ kāmarēṁdrēbhakhasiṁdhūdyattaraṁgōtkara nibharuciratkīrttiga
rvviṣṭhadarppiṣṭhakhaḷapradhvaṁsaka rbhbhāsuraguṇaniḷaya rśśiṣṭasantarppaṇa rṣṣaṇmukhaśauryya rddrōṇi
kāgrāmada varadharaṇīdēvatāsaṁkuḷaṁgaḷ . sujanādhāra rudāra rggajavairiparākrama rvvi rājitatēja
rbhbhujabaḷadaḷitārātibraja renisida seṭṭi�ruṁ vasumatiyoḷ . v® . vinayāḷaṁ karaṇa rvvivēkaniḷa
ya rggaṁbhīryyaratnākara rmmanumārgga rssujanaikabāṁdhavariḷālōkapraṇūta rvviśiṣṭanikāyāṁbujaṣaṇḍa
caṇḍakiraṇa rdrōṇīpurāṁbhōdhivardhdhanacaṁdra rssale seṭṭiguttareseda rvviśvaṁbharācakra dōḷ . caladoḷ cā
gadoḷarmminoḷ vibhavadoḷ gaṁbhīryyadoḷ dhairyyadoḷ kuladoḷ dōrvvala doḷ vivēkado ḷiḷāvikhyātiyo
ḷ nītiyoḷ lalitākāradoḷeṁtu bhāvisuvoḍaṁ sāmānyarē bhūribhūtaḷadoḷ dōṇiya seṭṭiguttare
na linnēvaṇnipaṁ baṇnipaṁ . © svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhāṇa japa
samādhiśīḷasaṁpannaruṁ sujanaprasannaruṁ samastabhuvanajanasaṁstūyamānānēkaguṇamaṇi
gaṇāḷaṁkaraṇaruṁ duṣṭadarppiṣṭhaniṣṭhurārātisainyasaṁpa rasukavi sukanikaracārukōrakita
śaraṇāgatavajraprākāraruṁ śaśāṁkaśaṁkhasaṁkāśa yaśōvibhāsitadiśācakraruṁ .
janarakṣādakṣaruṁ . vitaraṇaviḷāsavipuḷaphaḷaphaḷita
stajanasaṁtarppaṇaruṁ Agaṇyapuṇyakāruṇyamū
satyaśauca drōṇikāpurāpārapārāvāraparivarddhanasudhākararuṁ saujanya
ratnākararuṁ śāpā ruṁ mukhōdgatasamastaśāstrārttharuṁ vīrāṁganāvadanakamaḷaprasannapuḷakaruṁ nija
kuḷatiḷakaruṁ dānavinō drōṇikādēvīlabdhavaraprasādarumappa śrīmanmahāgrahāraṁ drōṇāpuradūroḍe
yapramukhamahājanamaṟuvadiṁbaruṁ samastaseṭṭiyaru mirddu śrīcāḷukyavikramakāla
da 20 neya yuvasaṁvatsarada phālguṇa suddha trayōdaśi brahaspativāradaṁdu . tarkka yama
kaḷaṁkō vyākaraṇē śākaṭāyanō bhagavān traividyōmunicaṁdrassidhdhāntē siddhanandī munī . yā
punīyasaṁgada vṛkṣamūlagaṇada municaṁdratraividyabhaṭṭārakara śiṣyarappa cārukīrtti paṇḍitargge da
savarmma seṭṭiya magaṁ sōviseṭṭi munnaṁ basadiyaṁ māḍisi biṭṭa tōṁṭaṁ mattareraḍuvare namaśya baḍagalu kalla
bhaṇḍeyabaṭṭeyē mēre mūḍalu baṭṭeyē mēre teṁkalu maṇḍeyaramalliseṭṭiya tōṁṭavē mēre
paḍuvalu kōṭīśvarada Akkasā da tōṁṭaṁgaḷē mēre . © Ā tōṁṭakke vāyavyada deseya
li Ayciseṭṭi koṭṭa mattar namaśya seṭṭiya . rēviseṭṭiya tōṁṭaṁgaḷē mēre . mūḍalu Ōṇiyabaṭṭe
yē mēre . teṁkalu celvamayyana kēsiyaṇnana tōṁṭavē mēre . paḍuvalu moṟaḍiyē mēre . © Ūriṁdaṁ mūḍalu
gaṁgabbeya haḷḷa baḍagalu kiṟimaṁgarayyana tōṁṭada teṁkadeseyalu Ūru koṭṭa kamma 225 © basadiyakēri
ge baḍagalu siriyaṇnana Aṁgaḍiya Udayaṇnana . honnōleyamuddiseṭṭiya saṁkarayyana manegaḷē mēra . paḍu
valu bīdiyē mēre . teṁkalu basadiya mūḍaṇa gōṁṭu mēre . mūḍa lakkasāle nēmō java maneya hattibanda bī
diyē mēre Eṁdiṁtu basadige munnaṁ naḍeva mūṟuṁ staḷada tōṁṭaṁgaḷaṁ kērige bēṟe bēṟe Āghāṭaśuddhiya māḍi
śiḷāśāsanamaṁ bareyisi koṭṭanu . Adeṁtaṁdaḍe dēvara pūjegaṁ khaṇḍasphuṭitakkaṁ Āhārā bhayabhaiśaryya
śāstradānarkkamāgi naḍeyisuvar . Intī dharmmamaṁ sadharmmadiṁ rakṣisi vargga prayāge Ārghyatīrtthaṁ bāṇa
rāśiyoḷ sāyira kavileyaṁ kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ ponnalu kaṭṭi saṁkrāntiyalu sāsirvva rvvēdapāragarappa
brāhmaṇargge dānaṁgoṭṭa phaḷamakku . Ī dharmmamanaḷidavargge Ī puṇyatīrthaṁgaḷalu sāyira kavileyuṁ sāsirvva
rbrāhmaṇarumanaḷida mahāpātakarappar . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō
bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētānbhāginaḻpārtthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatērāmabhadraḥ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō
rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmi . municaṁdrasiddhāntadēvara guḍḍaṁ ḍāyimayya bareda . ©
Digital edition of SII 11.140 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
